payment_gateway_notifications.summary: Inbound notifications from payment gateways (webhooks, IPNs). transaction_id is REQUIRED and UNIQUE.

schema_registry.summary: Registry of schema versions applied to various components.

must_change_password.Description: Force password change at next login.

sync_errors.summary: Errors raised while applying replication batches.

created_at.Description: Timestamp when the error was recorded.

encrypted_fields.summary: Per-field encryption store for arbitrary entities.

merkle_anchors.summary: Anchors proving Merkle roots in external systems (files, blockchain, etc.).

meta.Description: JSON metadata tied to the anchor.

anchor_ref.Description: Reference or locator for the anchor.

user_identities.summary: External identity links (OAuth/OpenID/etc.). One row per (provider, provider_user_id).

provider_user_id.Description: User id at provider. Part of UNIQUE (provider, provider_user_id).

provider.Description: Provider key (e.g., google, github). Part of UNIQUE (provider, provider_user_id).

tenant_domains.summary: Tenant-owned domains used for routing/custom branding.

is_primary.Description: Whether this domain is the tenant primary.

replication_lag_samples.summary: Snapshot metrics measuring replication lag per peer.

signing_keys.summary: Inventory of signing keys (local, KMS-backed, or imported).

kms_key_id.Description: Backing KMS key if stored hardware-side.

window_interval.Description: Interval over which the SLO is computed.

objective.Description: JSON description of what is being measured.

rate_limit_counters.summary: Sliding-window counters for rate limiting enforcement.

count.Description: Number of hits recorded during the window.

rbac_user_roles.summary: Assignments of RBAC roles to users.

tax_rates.summary: Tax rates per country and goods category. UNIQUE (country_iso2, category, valid_from).

kms_keys.summary: External KMS key references. UNIQUE (provider_id, external_key_ref).

external_key_ref.Description: Provider-specific key identifier. Part of UNIQUE (provider_id, external_key_ref).

payment_webhooks.summary: Raw webhook payloads (deduplicated by payload_hash UNIQUE).

audit_chain.summary: Hash chain built on top of audit_log entries for tamper evidence.

prev_hash.Description: Hash of the previous audit entry in the chain.

crypto_keys.summary: Local key registry (DEKs, KEKs, HMAC, peppers).

created_by.Description: Admin user who created key (FK users.id).

is_backup_encrypted.Description: Backup blob is encrypted with KEK.

event_outbox.summary: Outbox table for domain events waiting to be published downstream.

next_attempt_at.Description: When the next attempt is scheduled.

entity_pk.Description: Primary key of the originating row.

locked_by.Description: Worker id that holds the lock.

privacy_requests.summary: Data-subject privacy requests (access, erasure, portability, etc.).

device_fingerprints.summary: Known device/browser fingerprints with derived risk scoring.

fingerprint_hash.Description: Stable hash of the fingerprint payload.

last_seen.Description: Last time the device was observed.

first_seen.Description: Timestamp when the device first appeared.

kms_providers.summary: Configured KMS providers. name is UNIQUE.

key_rotation_jobs.summary: Planned and executed key rotation jobs.

carts.summary: Carts keyed by UUID; may be anonymous or bound to user.

payments.summary: Payment attempts and final captures for orders.

kms_routing_policies.summary: Routing directives describing how tenants map to KMS providers.

match.Description: JSON filter describing when to apply the policy.

order_item_downloads.summary: Per-order download entitlements for digital items. UNIQUE (order_id, book_id, asset_id).

entity_external_ids.summary: Links between local entities and identifiers in external systems.

entity_pk.Description: Primary key value of the local record.

book_assets.summary: Binary and ancillary assets for books (covers, files, extras). UNIQUE (book_id, asset_type) â€” max. one asset of a given type per book.

is_encrypted.Description: Whether asset is encrypted at rest.

encryption_key_enc.Description: Wrapped DEK or encrypted key blob.

field_hash_policies.summary: Effective hashing policy assignments for sensitive columns.

effective_from.Description: Timestamp when the policy takes effect.

rate_limits.summary: Configured rate-limiting rules at the application level.

limit_count.Description: Number of allowed operations within the window.

crypto_standard_aliases.summary: Friendly aliases mapped to crypto_algorithms entries.

global_id_registry.summary: ULID/UUID registry for mapping global ids to local tables.

key_wrapper_layers.summary: Individual layers that compose a key wrapper.

kem_ciphertext.Description: Ciphertext blob for the wrapped key material.

aad.Description: JSON AAD metadata used during wrapping.

kms_key_id.Description: KMS key used for the layer, if any.

kem_algo_id.Description: KEM algorithm used for wrapping (FK crypto_algorithms.id).

book_id.Description: Book (FK books.id), optional for non-book items.

idempotency_keys.summary: Idempotency keys to deduplicate external payment/API requests.

invoices.summary: Issued invoices linked to orders. invoice_number is UNIQUE.

event_dlq.summary: Dead-letter queue holding events that failed permanently.

retryable.Description: Whether the event can be retried safely.

books.summary: Books catalog with pricing and stock flags.

cart_items.summary: Items added to shopping carts. UNIQUE (cart_id, book_id, sku) to prevent duplicate items in the cart.

unit_price.Description: Unit price at time of adding.

orders.summary: Orders lifecycle, totals, and encrypted customer blob.

uuid_bin.Description: UUID binary form (unique, for compact lookups).

login_attempts.summary: Login attempts per IP and (optional) user.

deletion_jobs.summary: Asynchronous deletion workflows coordinating cascading cleanup.

hard_delete.Description: Whether to permanently delete the row.

entity_pk.Description: Primary key of the row to delete.

variant.Description: Optional variant descriptor (hybrid, FIPS profile, etc.).

nist_level.Description: Post-quantum NIST security level, if any.

reviews.summary: User reviews and ratings for books. UNIQUE (book_id, user_id) â€” one user can only rate a book once.

pq_migration_jobs.summary: Jobs that migrate stored data to PQ-safe hashing/encryption policies.

scope.Description: What is being migrated (hashes, wrappers, signatures).

selection.Description: JSON selector describing the affected dataset.

policy_kms_keys.summary: KMS key assignments per encryption policy. PRIMARY KEY (policy_id, kms_key_id).

sync_batches.summary: Batches of events replicated between peers.

items_total.Description: Total number of events in the batch.

encryption_bindings.summary: Bindings assigning specific key wrappers to encrypted entity fields.

field_name.Description: Encrypted column name; NULL = whole row binding.

entity_pk.Description: Primary key value of the encrypted row.

peer_nodes.summary: Known database/application peers for replication and sync.

rbac_user_permissions.summary: Direct permission grants to users (outside of roles).

kms_health_checks.summary: Periodic health probes for KMS providers/keys.

kms_key_id.Description: Specific key being checked (FK kms_keys.id), optional.

tenants.summary: Top-level tenant/organization records used for multi-tenancy.

slug_ci.Description: Lowercase slug used for case-insensitive uniqueness.

used_at.Description: When token was used, if so.
When token was used, if so.

device_codes.summary: OAuth device-code flow storage (issued codes + approval payload).

device_code_hash.Description: Deterministic hash of device_code (HMAC; used for polling lookup).

device_code_key_version.Description: Key version used for device_code encryption.

user_code_hash.Description: Deterministic hash of user_code (HMAC; used for activation lookup).

client_id.Description: OAuth client id requesting the device code.

token_payload.Description: Encrypted token payload issued after approval (envelope JSON).

token_payload_key_version.Description: Key version used for token_payload encryption.

approved_at.Description: When the device code was approved by the user (UTC).

fingerprint.Description: HMAC fingerprint of the magic-link token.

user_id.Description: Optional FK users.id for convenience joins.

webauthn_credentials.summary: WebAuthn credentials (passkeys) stored per RP id and user.

user_id.Description: Optional FK users.id for convenience joins.

public_key.Description: Public key material for the credential.

last_used_at.Description: When the credential was last used, if tracked.

metadata.Description: Stored challenge metadata as JSON (type, subject, allowed credentials).

rewrap_jobs.summary: Key rewrap tasks that move ciphertexts to new key wrappers/KMS keys.

system_errors.summary: Application error/event log with grouping and resolution.

rbac_role_permissions.summary: Permission rules bundled with RBAC roles.

source.Description: Whether the rule came from repo or local overrides.

encryption_policy_bindings.summary: History of which encryption policy applies to a field.

effective_from.Description: Timestamp when the policy becomes active.

book_categories.summary: Many-to-many relationship between books and categories.

key_events.summary: Operational log for crypto key lifecycle and usage.

basename.Description: Key basename, if id not present.

slo_status.summary: Computed status entries for service-level objectives.

computed_at.Description: Timestamp when the SLO was evaluated.

max_redemptions.Description: Max total redemptions across users (0 = unlimited).

currency.Description: ISO 4217 currency for fixed discounts; NULL for percent.

migration_events.summary: Records describing migrations between schema versions.

encryption_policies.summary: Encryption policy registry and parameters. policy_name is UNIQUE.

coupon_redemptions.summary: Records of coupon usage per order and user.

rbac_repositories.summary: Sources of RBAC definitions (git repos, APIs, etc.).

last_commit.Description: Hash/identifier of the last synced commit.

signing_key_id.Description: Signing key used to verify snapshots (FK signing_keys.id).

user_consents.summary: Captured consents per user and version. UNIQUE (user_id, consent_type, version).

output_len.Description: Optional truncated output length in bytes.

api_keys.summary: Tenant/user scoped API tokens stored only as hashed secrets.

user_id.Description: User that created the token (FK users.id), optional.

token_hash_key_version.Description: Key version used when hashing the token.

rbac_roles.summary: RBAC role definitions synchronized from repositories.

event_key.Description: Event identifier transported in the batch.

event_inbox.summary: Inbox table for inbound events awaiting processing.

last_error.Description: Last error message written for the event.

newsletter_subscribers.summary: Newsletter subscription registry with double opt-in. email_hash is UNIQUE; confirm_selector is UNIQUE.

policy_algorithms.summary: Weights and priorities for algorithms used within an encryption policy.

rbac_sync_cursors.summary: Per-peer replication cursors for RBAC repositories.

last_synced_at.Description: Timestamp when the peer last synced.

key_wrappers.summary: Composite wrappers protecting DEKs with multiple KMS/crypto layers.

wrap_version.Description: Version number for the wrapper format.

rotated_at.Description: When the wrapper was rotated, if ever.

crypto_suite.Description: JSON description of the crypto suite used.

signatures.summary: Digital signatures over critical entities for audit integrity.

subject_pk.Description: Primary key of the signed record.

meta_email.Description: Generated/stored email extracted from meta for indexing/filtering.

audit_log.summary: Immutable trail of data changes across tables.

record_id.Description: Primary key of the affected record.

changed_by.Description: Actor user id (FK users.id) or NULL for system.

rbac_repo_snapshots.summary: Stored RBAC snapshots pulled from repositories.

metadata.Description: JSON metadata associated with the snapshot.

jwt_tokens.summary: Refresh/API token registry with revocation support.

token_hash_key_version.Description: Key version used for token hashing.

is_protected.Description: Marks sensitive values for redaction in UIs.

setting_value.Description: Value as text (may contain JSON when type=json).

updated_by.Description: User who changed the setting (FK users.id).

session_audit.summary: Low-level session lifecycle and security events.

csrf_key_version.Description: Key version for CSRF related data.

data_retention_policies.summary: Declarative data-retention rules describing purge/anonymize actions.

field_name.Description: Optional column restricted by the policy.

active.Description: Whether the policy is currently enforced.

merkle_roots.summary: Per-period Merkle root snapshots for append-only data.

proof_uri.Description: Optional URI pointing to notarized proof bundles.

period_start.Description: Start timestamp of the covered period.

status.Description: Lifecycle state of the Merkle root (pending/anchored/verified/failed).

period_end.Description: End timestamp of the covered period.

inventory_reservations.summary: Temporary stock reservations tied to orders.
